verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I looked over Jordan and what did I see Coming for to carry me home; A band of angels coming after me, Coming for to carry me home.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Swing low, sweet chariot, Coming for to carry me home; Swing low, sweet chariot, Coming for to carry me home.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you get there before I do, Coming for to carry me home; Tell all my friends I'm a-coming too, Coming for to carry me home.
